text: Abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a technology that extracts relevant information from images based on the content of the questions, and gives feedback in the form of answers. The applications are abundant, including visual auxiliary means, intelligent surveillance system, and human-robot interaction, etc. Currently, the VQA system still has many problems to solve, and the main difficulties lie in that image features are difficult to abstract the scene and object information in the image, and the text information in the question is also difficult to express fully. This paper mainly focuses on the improvement of the VQA system through multi-scale feature extraction and fusion methods in the image feature characterization and text information representation of VQA, and significantly improves the accuracy of VQA system. The improvement process is as follows: first, for the problem of image feature representation, this paper uses the multi-scale feature extraction and fusion method to train the VQA system, extracts the image features extracted by different layers of a pre-trained deep neural network, and then carried out the experiments to obtain the optimal feature fusion method through a series of experimental verifications; secondly, for the problem of sentence representation, this paper also uses the multi-scale feature extraction and fusion method to train the VQA system, extracts the word-level, phrase-level, and sentence-level features in the sentence and then carries out the fusion, so as to effectively enhance the representational ability of sentences; finally, this paper improves the VQA model by using the multi-scale feature extraction and fusion method, and experimental results show that the improvement of multi-scale feature extraction and fusion leads to higher accuracy in VQA system.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
